name: PSG Golf
about: PSG Golf is an indoor golf facility offering memberships, expert lessons, swing analysis, and event bookings. It is tailored for young professionals and golf enthusiasts seeking a modern golfing experience. The facility provides 24-hour access for members, along with flexible plans designed for all levels of golfers and enthusiasts.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulators and launch monitors

food_and_drink.notes: Discounts on food and drinks for members.

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting-edge analysis technology used for fitting and instruction.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, and club rentals or fitting services are also available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted. The facility offers discounts on food and drinks for members.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time can vary depending on the simulator software and your pace of play, typically ranging from 1.5 to 2 hours for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is PSG Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is welcoming to golfers of all ages and skill levels, including juniors and youth.
